basic_details.job_title: DEO Nuapada Legal Retainer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Education Office Nuapada (DEO Nuapada) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Legal Retainer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 23-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Local private practitioner Well conversant with Govt. Private, Service matters and Odisha Education Rules, GIA Policy matters. Consider the Experience and reputation of the Advocate.

selection_process: Selection based on committee's consideration of Experience and reputation Panel of three names will be prepared Advocate to convey willingness to accept offer and terms
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DEO Nuapada Legal Retainer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nuapada.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DEO Nuapada Legal Retainer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.nuapada.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DEO Nuapada Legal Retainer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DEO Nuapada Legal Retainer post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Legal Retainer post at the District Education Office Nuapada is 23rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Legal Retainer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Legal Retainer position will receive a salary of Rs. 15,000 per month, paid within the 5th of every following month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the basic qualifications required for the Legal Retainer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be local private practitioners well-versed in government and private service matters, Odisha Education Rules, and GIA Policy matters. A graduate qualification is also required.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the DEO Nuapada Legal Retainer recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by sending the application form with Bio-Data in a sealed cover, either through postal service or by hand, before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Legal Retainer position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Legal Retainer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Legal Retainer post announced by the District Education Office Nuapada.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Legal Retainer position?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on the committee's consideration of the advocate's experience and reputation, followed by the preparation of a panel of three names.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Legal Retainer position is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the District Education Office Nuapada?
faq.answer: The official website of the District Education Office Nuapada is www.nuapada.nic.in.
